subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath manifested His Cause, fulfilled His promise, aided His hosts, revealed His Books, and sent forth His Messengers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر امره و انجز وعده و نصر جنده و انزل کتبه و ارسل رسله و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
